{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Aethertech implant
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Karoshan]] agent had an [[Aethertech implant]] at the back of his neck.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
